Title: The Anatomy of a Centenarian's Plate
Description: A beautifully illustrated guide to the diet of people in Blue Zones, identifying the key plant-based foods for longevity.

Title: Lifespan vs. Healthspan: Squaring the Curve
Description: Learn the difference between lifespan and healthspan, and the actionable habits needed to square your curve for prolonged vitality.

Title: The Hierarchy of Longevity Habits
Description: A simple pyramid showing what foundational daily habits you must prioritize for a long, healthy life before focusing on supplements.

Title: The 24-Hour Cellular Repair Routine
Description: An ideal daily schedule spanning 24 hours that is optimized to boost your circadian rhythm, longevity, and deep sleep.

Title: 5 Physical Markers of True Biological Age
Description: Discover 5 physical tests and markers like Grip Strength and VO2 Max that reveal your true biological age instead of your chronological age.
